title: XSS in login.php
summary: [P1] CVE-2026-30252 is a reflected cross-site scripting vulnerability in login.php, with no patch available. This vulnerability can be exploited to steal user credentials or perform unauthorized actions. Why now: This vulnerability is particularly concerning due to its potential for credential theft. (confidence: 0.80)

title: API Key Exposure
summary: [P1] CVE-2026-35467 is a vulnerability that exposes stored API keys in temporary browser client, with no patch available.
